summary.en: A 6-12 panel comic-style sequence walking a target customer through 'before, during, and after' the moment your idea exists in their life. Discovery via reaction.
summary.zh: 6-12 格漫画式序列,带目标客户走过 "你的 idea 出现在他们生活中之前、之中、之后" 的时刻。通过他们的反应做 Discovery。

sources.label: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Discovery / Storyboard

headline.en: Draw the end-to-end experience before scaling it.
headline.zh: 先画完整体验，再放大它。

story.en: Airbnb famously storyboarded host and guest journeys to make the end-to-end service experience visible. By drawing scenes such as discovery, booking, arrival, stay, and post-trip moments, the team could discuss where the experience broke down and what needed to be designed before scaling the marketplace further.
story.zh: Airbnb 曾用故事板把房东和房客的端到端旅程可视化。团队把发现、预订、到达、入住、离开后等场景画出来，从而讨论体验在哪里断裂，以及在继续放大平台前哪些环节需要被设计清楚。

examples.source: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Storyboard, pp. 186-189; public Airbnb design accounts on storyboarding the host and guest journey

text.en:
Replace this with one fragile scenario assumption.

e.g. [Target users] recognize the trigger, sequence, and payoff of [new experience] as a believable way to make progress.
text.zh:
替换成一条最脆弱的场景假设。

例如：[目标用户] 能识别 [新体验] 的触发、过程和收益，并认为它是可信的进展方式。

text.en:
We believe [target users] will understand and prefer the proposed scenario for [job].

To verify, we will show 3 low-fidelity storyboard alternatives to 8 users within 1 week.

And measure recognition, emotional resonance, missing steps, preferred version, and objections.

We are right if ≥ 6/8 recognize the situation and ≥ 5 choose the same scenario as most compelling.
text.zh:
我们相信 [目标用户] 能理解并偏好 [任务] 的拟议场景。

为了验证，我们将 在 1 周内向 8 位用户展示 3 个低保真故事板方案。

并测量 场景识别、情绪共鸣、缺失步骤、偏好版本和异议。

如果 ≥ 6/8 识别该情境，且 ≥ 5 人选择同一个最有吸引力方案 = 通过。

text.en:
Sketch: create 3 alternatives, each with 6-8 panels: trigger, current struggle, first interaction, key decision, value delivery, outcome, and after-state. Keep visuals rough; make context and sequence clear.

Recruit: 8 people who recently experienced [scenario]. Run 30-minute critique sessions, remote or in person.

Run: show one storyboard at a time. Ask users to narrate what is happening, mark confusing panels, choose the most believable scenario, and describe what would stop them. Record quotes and panel-level annotations.
text.zh:
绘制：做 3 个方案，每个 6-8 格：触发、当前困境、首次互动、关键决策、价值交付、结果和后状态。视觉保持粗糙，但上下文和顺序必须清楚。

招募：8 位最近经历过 [场景] 的人。远程或线下跑 30 分钟评审。

执行：一次展示一个故事板。让用户讲述发生了什么、标记困惑画面、选择最可信方案，并说明什么会阻止他们。记录原话和每格批注。

text.en:
Pass: ≥ 6/8 correctly narrate the intended situation; ≥ 5 prefer the same storyboard; no critical step is marked confusing by more than 2 users.

Fail: users cannot follow the sequence, reject the premise, or disagree on the moment of value.

Inconclusive: premise resonates but sequence is confusing; redraw panels and retest 5 users.
text.zh:
通过：≥ 6/8 正确复述预期情境；≥ 5 人偏好同一个故事板；没有关键步骤被超过 2 人标记为困惑。

失败：用户跟不上顺序、拒绝前提，或对价值出现的关键时刻没有共识。

不清晰：前提有共鸣但顺序困惑；重画画面后再测 5 位。

text.en:
Fill in after running.

Users tested: __ ; Correct narration: __ /8; Winning storyboard: __ ; Preference count: __ /8.

Most confusing panel: __ . Missing step: __ . Verdict: validated / invalidated / inconclusive.
text.zh:
实验后填写。

测试用户：__；正确复述：__ /8；胜出故事板：__；偏好人数：__ /8。

最困惑画面：__。缺失步骤：__。结论：已验证 / 已证伪 / 不清晰。

text.en:
Pick one based on the result.

• Persevere → turn the winning storyboard into a Clickable Prototype, Explainer Video, or Smoke Test.
• Pivot → redraw the trigger, sequence, or customer segment and rerun.
• Kill → if users do not recognize the job, return to Customer Interviews.
text.zh:
根据结果选一个。

• Persevere → 把胜出故事板转成 Clickable Prototype、Explainer Video 或 Smoke Test。
• Pivot → 重画触发、顺序或客群，再跑一次。
• Kill → 如果用户不识别这个 Job，回到客户访谈。
